rule_metadata.name: movefile64_exe
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'movefile64.exe' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule movefile64_exe
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'movefile64.exe' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "movefile64.exe"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /movefile64\.exe\s\/nobanner\s.{0,1000}\.dll\sC\:\\Windows\\System32\\amsi\.dll/ nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
